what_went_well: All 4 phases of E2E testing infrastructure implemented successfully
100 new E2E tests added across 3 new test files (e2e-pipeline.test.ts, e2e-supervisor.test.ts, e2e-batch.test.ts)
All new tests pass — 0 failures in new test files
Tests run in < 35s total (well within 60s constraint)
Real filesystem (tmpdir) used — no filesystem mocking
Executor mocked correctly — no real LLM calls
DB calls mocked in supervisor tests — no real DB connections
Fixtures enhanced with git repo fixture, mock result builders, pipeline plan helper, root-cause counter
Pre-existing test failures reduced from 27 to 7 (supervisor.test.ts timeouts fixed as side effect of db-info mock)
Test coverage spans: full pipeline lifecycle, HITL flow, retry flow, stall detection, error categorization, batch promotion, dependency resolution, lock file singleton
what_went_wrong: 7 pre-existing test failures remain (actions.test.ts: 5, tasks.test.ts: 1, task-state-v2.test.ts: 1) — these are out of scope
improvement_suggestions: Fix pre-existing actions.test.ts failures (archiveTask requires summary.md — tests don't create it)
Fix pre-existing tasks.test.ts sort order test (sort order changed in implementation)
Add E2E tests for the TUI monitor (App.test.tsx) with more realistic state scenarios
Add E2E tests for the cleanup command with actual file age simulation
deviations_from_spec: writeRootCauseReport is not exported from supervisor.ts — tested indirectly via file system assertions and countRootCauseReports helper
Worker pool spawn/reap tests not included as they require real async pipeline execution — covered via workerLoop unit behavior through promoteNextTodoToPending
Headless watch mode timer tests not included — cmdHeadlessLoop runs indefinitely and requires SIGTERM to stop
